title: Combined Bothan Clans

The '''Bothan Council''', known also as the '''Combined Bothan Clans''', was the legislature of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that ruled [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] and controlled all the the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]]. 

The offices of the heads of the Combined Clans were housed in the [[Combined Clans Center Building]] near [[Merchant's Square]] in [[Drev'starn]].
==Structure==
It was composed of members of 608 registered [[clan]]s, with other clans petitioning for recognition membership. A majority vote would determine recognition of those new clans (meaning that relations and diplomacy played a significant role for the result).<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

Of those registered clans, ruling chiefs voted for the 21 members of the Council (18 representing the nation-states of the homeworld, and 3 more representing the colonies). In turn, those 21 members voted for the [[Council Chief]] among them; each of the 21 Council members also assigned leaders of the other 587 Clans to positions around the ministries and the government; past support and alliances played a role in those assignments.<ref name="guide" />

The Council Chief held the power of casting the deciding vote on stalemated issues.<ref name="guide" /> The Chief also had the capacity  of the [[First Secretary]], and served for one year.

A member had to be a true practictioner of the [[Bothan Way]] to reach their position and maintain it, and represent the interests of their clan leader; otherwise their constituents might impeach and replace them. This resulted not only to political complications and delays, but to personal loss of power and prestige, and public shame.<ref name="guide" />

==History==
The Council had legislative control over all of [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]]. It had [[Allied Region]] status within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. 

The Council also had the authority to declare a state of [[ar'krai]]. 

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Savielk Trey'dra]] led the Bothan Council.<ref name="guide" /> They assumed control over most of the other organs of the Bothan government, with only the [[Bothan Diplomatic Corps]] remaining independent. 

Although the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] did not wish to subjugate Bothawui, Imperial entities attempted to control the Council's economic policies.<ref name="guide" />

After the Galactic Civil War, it was officially reorganised and expanded into a government outright, and renamed the Combined Clans, but many continued to refer to it as the Bothan Council.
